title: Stage 3 Jetson A/B report
description: Extends the base sandbox report schema (report.schema.json) with the fields required to distinguish Group A (local MNN) from Group B (remote VLM) and to make the executing model's identity auditable. See docs/STAGE3_AB_TESTING_SPEC.md.

stage3_group.description: Which Stage 3 group (docs/STAGE3_AB_TESTING_SPEC.md) this report covers. Must never be confused with the historical Capability A/B demos.

cv_execution_location.description: CV always runs on the Jetson for both groups.

vlm_execution_location.description: Group A must be jetson_local; Group B must be remote.

backend.description: Must reflect the backend actually observed at inference time — never asserted from configuration alone.

manifest_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the model manifest that was loaded, so the claimed identity is verifiable.

call_evidence.description: At least one real-call reference per case (request/response artifact reference), not a restatement of the case result.

network.description: Required when stage3_group is B — Group A has no network hop to record.

hardware_validation_status.description: Must stay not_run until a reviewed immutable evidence record exists (jetson_runner/HARDWARE_VALIDATION.md). No Stage 3 report may set this to passed by itself.

production_eligible.description: Every Stage 3 A/B report must keep this false until hardware validation passes and is reviewed.
